tables.name: users
tables.create_backup: create table users_bu_ as select * from users;
tables.create_table: create table users(no int, email varchar, subscription_active boolean, start_pro timestamp, end_pro timestamp, plan_type varchar default 'free', videos_remaining integer default 0);

tables.name: promo_codes
tables.create_backup: create table promo_codes_bu_ as select * from promo_codes;
tables.create_table: create table promo_codes(code varchar primary key, duration_days int, max_uses int, uses_count int default 0, active boolean default 1, created_at datetime default current_timestamp);

tables.name: channels
tables.create_backup: create table channels_bu_ as select * from channels;
tables.create_table: create table channels(name varchar, video_id varchar unique, transcript_downloaded boolean, transcript_parsed boolean, ts datetime default current_timestamp, video_date timestamp, guest varchar, description_summary varchar, valid bool, primary key (name, video_id));

tables.name: answers
tables.create_backup: create table answers_bu_ as select * from answers;
tables.create_table: create table answers(no int, video_id varchar, text varchar, asset varchar, sentiment varchar, quotes varchar, ts datetime default current_timestamp, primary key (video_id, no), foreign key (video_id) references channels(video_id));

tables.name: raw_answers
tables.create_backup: create table raw_answers_bu_ as select * from raw_answers;
tables.create_table: create table raw_answers(video_id varchar, text varchar, ts datetime default current_timestamp, primary key (video_id, text));

tables.name: transcripts
tables.create_backup: create table transcripts_bu_ as select * from transcripts;
tables.create_table: create table transcripts(no int, video_id varchar, text varchar, start number, duration number, ts datetime default current_timestamp, primary key (video_id, text, start), foreign key (video_id) references channels(video_id));

views.name: vw_assets
views.create_view: CREATE VIEW vw_assets AS SELECT DISTINCT asset FROM answers;

views.name: vw_guests
views.create_view: CREATE VIEW vw_guests AS SELECT DISTINCT guest FROM channels;

views.name: vw_dates
views.create_view: CREATE VIEW vw_dates AS SELECT MIN(video_date) AS min_video_date, MAX(video_date) AS max_video_date FROM channels;

views.name: vw_sentiments
views.create_view: CREATE VIEW vw_sentiments AS SELECT DISTINCT sentiment FROM answers;
